Editor, PhoneHowTo

Jordan Reyes

Writes the how-tos carrier reps wish they could send you by text. Tests steps on real iPhones and Galaxy phones.

Jordan Reyes spent eight years as a lead at a major carrier store — the person staff escalated to when a customer needed screenshots, backups, or a phone that would not turn on five minutes before a flight. PhoneHowTo publishes the exact menu paths once, clearly, with the model name in the title.

Every guide is checked on hardware. When Apple or Samsung moves a setting in a point release, the article gets a dated update note.

Recent articles

  • How to screenshot on iPhone 15 and iPhone 16 (every method)
  • How to screenshot on Samsung Galaxy S24 and A-series phones
  • iPhone battery draining fast — 12 fixes that actually work (iOS 18)
  • Android storage full: what to delete first without losing photos
  • How to transfer everything from old iPhone to new iPhone
  • How to transfer data from Android to iPhone (Move to iOS walkthrough)

PhoneHowTo

Model-specific how-tos for iPhone, Galaxy, Pixel, and Motorola. Screenshots, backups, battery drain, storage full, frozen screen, transfer to a new phone — no fluff, no 12-minute intro.
